repair_candidate.summary: Repair PR #92165 in place so `openclaw doctor` preserves the existing `No active memory plugin` diagnostic while also rendering the gateway-provided memory dreaming status when memory search is configured but no active backend resolves.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(memory): show dreaming status without search
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair the existing #92165 branch so doctor keeps the no-active-memory-plugin warning and still prints available memory dreaming status.
- Add a focused regression for configured memory search plus no active backend with a gateway dreaming payload.
- Keep the change scoped to doctor output; do not broaden provider discovery, scheduling, promotion, or gateway ownership.

## Credit
This continues the fix from @bennewell35 in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92165. Clownfish is repairing the contributor branch in place so the source PR remains the credited path.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-memory-search.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

Closes #87637.
credit_notes: Repair contributor branch for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/92165 rather than replacing it; original author @bennewell35 keeps authorship for the core fix commits.
OpenClaw release-note context belongs in the PR body or squash message; root policy says not to edit CHANGELOG.md for a normal PR.
